song.title: By Faith
song.presentation: V1 V2 C V3 V4 C V5 C
song.lyrics:
[V] .A Asus 1By faith we see the hand of God 2By faith our fathers roamed the earth . A F#m Esus 1In the light of creation's grand design 2With the power of His promise in their hearts . D Esus D E F#m 1In the lives of those who prove His faithfulness 2Of a holy city built by God's own hand .D Esus A 1 Who walk by faith and not by sight 2 A place where peace and justice reign
[C] . F#m D A We will stand as children of the promise . F#m D A Esus We will fix our eyes on Him, our soul's reward . F#m D A D Bm7 Till the race is finished and the work is done . D Esus A We'll Walk by faith and not by sight
[V] .A Asus 3By faith the prophets saw a day 4By faith the church was called to go . A F#m Esus 3When the longed for Messiah would appear 4In the power of the Spirit to the lost . D Esus D E F#m 3With the power to break the chains of sin and death 4To deliver captives and to preach good news .D Esus A 3 And rise triumphant form the grave 4 In every corner of the earth -!!
[V5] .A Asus By faith this mountain shall be moved . A F#m Esus And the power of the gospel shall prevail . D Esus D E F#m For we know in Christ all things are possible .D Esus A For all who call upon His name
